{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220751504C5318D37EB50B7B5B4A"}"},"total":7},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7330994555907179326","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"之前就看过，不过断更了[捂脸]今天又从推荐里看到了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1706882323,"group_id":"7216297095681018919","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"悠远的天空，在苍穹的尽头","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9cMOU6L28mEf62BD8oayC8=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d5e56f9d10eb40068202e36c16971e8f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776703979&x-signature=W8vtoGktQsdKw%2BOdds7TO6dg6vE%3D","user_id":"707721155603899","user_name":"穹尽一生拥悠"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"707721155603899","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7216297095681018919","book_info":{"abstract":"一只猫被主角从古建筑中偶然救出，之后黏着他不走，主角屡次驱赶，次日它还会出现，一天主角正对着电脑思索，它看了看突然口吐人言：“你这题做错了！”
地球，早在34.7亿年前，未知文明就来过，它们改造地球生态，造月球，单细胞生物诞生。
5.42亿年另一个未知文明来地球，再次改造地球生态，顺带播下生命的种子，出现了寒武纪生命大爆。
4.45亿年前还是一个未知文明路过地球，看到地球发展的不错，不知哪个大佬玩心大起，引导一颗小行星撞了地球一下，导致了志留纪生物大灭绝。
2.4亿年前一个稍微靠谱的高等文明选择用地球作为星际物资中转站，他们考察了地球的环境，认为氧气浓度过高，便给再次地球改造了一下大气环境，大量生物灭绝；鸟类，哺乳动物的部分祖先幸存下来，开始进一步进化。
6500万年前高级文明生物被恐龙吓了一跳，便顺手放了一颗锇铱弹，地球进入寒武纪，恐龙灭绝。
2000万年前，高级文明发生战争……
13000年前，地球上的一座外星建筑内，一道直径九百万公里的光柱直冲苍穹，通过时空桥连接到六千万亿光年外的一个巨引源上，一只猫被传送到地球……
《黑月科技》是一部科幻巨著，带你爽，带你飞，带你感受科技力量的无限可能！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oc13157179027f55aaff4f652d22088b3~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"忆三生","author_id":"","book_id":"7216297095681018919","book_name":"黑月科技","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181820","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":90,"name":"天才","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=90&name=天才&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":77,"name":"星际","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=77&name=星际&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":837,"name":"争霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=837&name=争霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":854,"name":"黑科技","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=854&name=黑科技&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7216297162358194745","read_count":"126","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"485440"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"151","tags":"科幻末世,星际,天才,搞笑轻松,争霸,黑科技","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oc13157179027f55aaff4f652d22088b3~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779321110&x-signature=BId1Fn9JsjfFLcpJmq736y6aDtY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3633252487948579","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"98"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220751504C5318D37EB50B7B5B4A"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":
